title: Beef Curry with Garlic
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired beef curry with garlic and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pan and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the garlic. Cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a simmer.
Return the beef to the pan and cook until the sauce thickens and the beef is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over basmati rice or with naan bread.
